checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 109 implements the next standardization target recorded by issue 107: a governed issue-to-merge operator surface.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: `issue-to-merge-plan` emits deterministic JSON, writes `.specbridge/issue-to-merge-runs/*.issue-to-merge-run.json`, records phases, gates, evidence paths, merge conditions, policy boundaries, and fails when `TaskId` is omitted.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: The new command boundary is plan-only and records that it does not create issues, open PRs, wait for CI, merge, launch Claude Code, launch Antigravity, install dependencies, or deploy.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changed files are limited to allowed CLI, test, documentation, memory, operator-run, contract, scope, report, audit, and audit-packet paths. No protected files, workflow security controls, dependency manifests, production configuration, secrets, keys, auth security, authorization security, billing, database, or deployment paths were changed.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: `scripts/test-specbridge-cli.ps1`, `scripts/specbridge-smoke.ps1`, standard validation, contract validation, scope validation, final report validation, audit packet validation, ChatGPT audit validation, security gate, review gate, and git diff whitespace validation passed locally.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI for issue 109 is not collected yet and remains an external merge gate. The final report marks CI as not_collected rather than passed.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records local completion pending PR CI, no deployment, and GitHub-mutating operator behavior as intentionally unimplemented future work.

findings.evidence: Issue 109 local operator evidence is prepared, but GitHub CI cannot be recorded as passed until the branch is pushed and checks run.
findings.recommendation: Push the branch, open a pull request, wait for GitHub checks, and merge only if required gates pass.

unresolved_risks: GitHub PR CI evidence is pending.
GitHub-mutating operator behavior remains intentionally unimplemented and requires a future dedicated contract.
